Index.title: HealthSync
Index.subtitle: A unified, intelligent platform connecting patients, doctors, and hospital administrators in one seamless experience.
Index.patient_desc: Book appointments, view records, and manage your health journey securely.
Index.doctor_desc: Manage your schedule, access patient histories, and streamline your clinical workflow.
Index.admin_desc: Monitor hospital metrics, manage staff loads, and analyze real-time patient flow.

PatientDashboard.overview: Here is your health overview for today.
PatientDashboard.triage_desc: Experiencing symptoms? Let our AI assign you the right priority and department instantly, or simply schedule a future visit.
PatientDashboard.records_desc: Access your complete medical history, lab results, and vaccination records.
PatientDashboard.pharmacy_desc: Order prescription refills and track your current medications easily.

PatientRegister.title: Create Patient Account
PatientRegister.subtitle: Join HealthSync to securely manage your health journey.
PatientRegister.verify_prompt: Please verify your phone number to continue.
PatientRegister.otp_sent: We've sent a 4-digit verification code to
PatientRegister.reg_success_desc: Your account has been created. Redirecting to login...
PatientRegister.check_email_desc: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please verify to continue.
